# Production Readiness Review

Candidate version/build:  
Artifact digest:  
Channel:  
Human release authority:

## Stable scope and unsupported behavior
## Supported platforms and hardware
## Requirements, risks, ADRs, owners, and backups
## SLOs and error budgets
## Compatibility and conformance
## Security, vulnerability response, and independent review
## Accessibility and usability
## Migration, data integrity, recovery, and rollback
## Build provenance, SBOM, signatures, and update metadata
## Services, privacy, offline behavior, and disaster recovery
## Support, legal, distribution, and end of life
## Exceptions and expiry
## Go/no-go decision
